# Quick Start: Next Steps (RIGHT NOW)

**You have**: 
- ✅ Full 6-week strategic plan (documented)
- ✅ Week 1 code ready to deploy
- ✅ Testing checklist prepared
- ✅ Action items listed

**Do this today**:

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies (if first time)
npm install

# 2. Start development server
npm run dev

# 3. Check the changes work:
# Visit: http://localhost:3000
#   → Look for new hero: "No eres modelo"
# Visit: http://localhost:3000/contact  
#   → Look for 3 WhatsApp buttons (📸 💍 🎓)
#   → Click one and verify WhatsApp opens

# 4. Test on mobile if you have one
# Open same URLs on phone to verify WhatsApp app opens
```

**If everything works**:
```bash
# Push to production
git add .
git commit -m "Phase 1: WhatsApp-first contact + new hero copy"
git push
```

**Then**:
- Monitor WhatsApp for incoming inquiries (start today)
- Collect testimonials this week
- Start organizing portfolio files
- Begin designing PDF guides in Canva
